message:
🌱 Add harbor: Proxy cache should serve cached images even if remote deleted mission (#755)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "harbor-22106-proxy-cache-should-serve-cached-images-even-if-remote-image-is-dele",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: Proxy cache should serve cached images even if remote image is deleted",
+    "description": "Proxy cache should serve cached images even if remote image is deleted. Requested by 25+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current harbor deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your harbor version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nhelm list -n harbor 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working harbor installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review harbor configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant harbor configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl get configmap -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=harbor\n```\nCurrently, when using Harbor's proxy cache, if an image exists in the local cache but has been deleted from the remote repository, Harbor will not deliver the cached image."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade Harbor to include the proxy cache fix",
+        "description": "Upgrade Harbor to a version that includes the proxy cache improvement:\n```bash\n# Update the Harbor Helm repo\nhelm repo update harbor\n\n# Upgrade Harbor\nhelm upgrade harbor harbor/harbor -n harbor -f values.yaml\n\n# Verify pods restart successfully\nkubectl rollout status deployment/harbor-core -n harbor\n```\nAfter upgrading, cached images will be served even if the remote image is deleted."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl get events -n harbor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Proxy cache should serve cached images even if remote image\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The proxy cache was updated to serve cached images even when the remote registry reports the image as deleted. Previously, if an image was deleted from the upstream registry, Harbor's proxy cache would return a 404 instead of serving the locally cached copy. The fix modifies the proxy cache logic to fall back to the local cache when the upstream returns a not-found error, ensuring cached images remain available.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "harbor",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "harbor"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/22106",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/pull/22152"
+    },
+    "reactions": 25,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with harbor installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:19:57.545Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
